title: marcgravia evenia subsp. calcicola
intro: Marcgravia evenia subsp. calcicola is a rare and endangered subspecies of the Marcgravia evenia plant, a flowering plant native to the tropical rainforests of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Marcgravia evenia subsp. calcicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat infections, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused in water to extract its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and uses.
